bird.name: 盔犀鳥
bird.summary: 盔犀鳥（學名：Rhinoplax vigil）是犀鳥科中體型非常大的鳥類。分佈於馬來半島、蘇門答臘、婆羅洲、泰國和緬甸。頭骨約佔其3公斤重量的11%。與任何其他犀鳥不同，其頭骨幾乎是實心的，用於雄性之間的格鬥。 描述 盔犀鳥的羽毛大部分是黑色的，除了腹部、腿和尾巴是白色的，尾巴…

relations.subject: 盔犀鳥
relations.evidence: After ongoing hunting pressure and habitat loss, the helmeted hornbill was uplisted from near threatened to critically endangered on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species in 2015
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 盔犀鳥
relations.evidence: After ongoing hunting pressure and habitat loss, the helmeted hornbill was uplisted from near threatened to critically endangered on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species in 2015
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
